programme.desc: Elizabeth Gilbert's perfect world comes shattering down when she gets divorced. She then embarks on a journey across the world in an attempt to rediscover her true self.

programme.desc: The heir to a political dynasty falls for a hotel maid who is also single mother, thinking of her to be a socialite. However, both realise that they are completely different as the truth comes out.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark, Bridget meets a handsome stranger, Jack. Soon, Bridget finds out that she is pregnant but is unsure about the identity of the father.

programme.title: Fun With Dick and Jane
programme.desc: When Dick's employer goes bankrupt, he and his wife, Jane, go broke and look for ways to make ends meet. Eventually, they resort to crime and decide to rob a crooked CEO to get their money back.

programme.title: Fight For Love
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang kidnaps Wing-sum and Yee-ting. Sai-hang demands a ransom of HK$10 million from Wai-man and warns him not to call the police. Wai-man and Yin-cho go the exchange location with the ransom. But they only see Yee-ting. Yin-cho gets hurt as he has a fight with Sai-hang.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Good Partner
programme.desc: The story follows popular divorce lawyer Cha Eun-Kyung (Jang Na-ra), who finds herself faced with her own marital crisis. She often clashes with rookie lawyer Han Yoo-Ri (Nam Ji-Hyun) over cases. A workplace battle between the two lawyers is about to unfold.

programme.title: Fight For Love
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel
programme.desc: To-ming asks Ting Ning to pass the letter to Sung Kiu. Sung Kiu contacts Fong Fong and gives the proposal to her. She suggests MLC building its own airport. She also tells Fong Fong not to let Chiu Hoi know this is her idea. While Sung Kiu opens the letter, she astonishingly sees To-ming turning up behind her.

programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Amanda bersetuju dengan Marian untuk tidak melantik Diana sebagai tukang masak di majlis perkahwinannya nanti. Luqman tahu hubungannya dengan Qistina akan mendapat tentangan keluarga.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Syed Arif dan Farhah tanpa bersulam cinta mengundang pelbagai konflik. Ketika hubungan mula serasi, Syed Arif bertemu semula dengan kekasih lamanya, Katrina yang rupanya adik kepada Farhah.

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang 3 remaja wanita dari latarbelakang keluarga yang berbeza mengejar gelaran Ratu Tenpin Negara.

programme.title: Season 4 Episode 1
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. programme.title: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Tie Break Tens is a fast-paced, knockout tennis format featuring exclusively 10-point tiebreak matches with no games or sets.
